zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Russell MP於大約1401年出生在英國多瑟特維姆斯時，他的父親Stephen Russell68歲，母親Alice de la Tour18歲。他和Elizabeth Herring至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1463年10月在英國多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特拉迪朋爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Russell MP于大约1401年出生在英国多瑟特維姆斯时，他的父亲Stephen Russell68岁，母亲Alice de la Tour18岁。他和Elizabeth Herring至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1463年10月在英国多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特拉迪朋爾。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: MP
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Kam, Chi, Chu, Chun Wah, Hon, Kwai, Lai, Ping, Pui, Chan, Cheng, Chi Keung.
Chinese: alternative Cantonese form of the surname 葉, see   Ye   1.

variants.name: Ye
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Hong, Jian, Qing, Feng, Zhong, Bin, Jin, Li, Mei, Min, Ming, Wen.  Korean Chol, Dong Sup, Jong Chul, Myong, Neng, Sook Young, Sung Chul.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 葉, meaning ‘leaf’ in Chinese: (i) from the placename Ye (葉), the name of a fief (located in Henan province) granted to Shen Zhu Liang, son of an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) traced back to a minority ethnic group in ancient southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 野: shortened form of the Chinese surname Dong-Ye (東野), which was derived from name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to Yu, nephew of King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Russell MP was born about 1401, in Weymouth, Dorset, England, his father, Stephen Russell, was 68 and his mother, Alice de la Tour, was 18. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Herring. He died in October 1463, in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Radipole, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Russell MP est né environ 1401, à Weymouth, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Stephen Russell, avait 68 ans et sa mère, Alice de la Tour, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Herring. Il est décédé en octobre 1463, à Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Radipole, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Russell MP um 1401 in Weymouth, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen Russell 68 und seine Mutter Alice de la Tour 18. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Herring mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Oktober 1463 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England und wurde in Radipole, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Russell MP è nato il circa 1401 nel Weymouth, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Stephen Russell, aveva 68 anni e il suo madre, Alice de la Tour, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Herring. Morì nel ottobre 1463, nel Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Radipole, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Russell MPが約1401年にイギリスドールセトウエイモウスで生まれた時，父Stephen Russellは68歳，母Alice de la Tourは18歳であった。彼はElizabeth Herringとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1463年10月にイギリスドールセトメルコンベ レジスで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトラディプオルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Russell MP(이)가 대략 1401년 영국 도르세트 w이모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Russell(은)는 68세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de la Tour(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Herring(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 10월 영국 도르세트 멜코브 레지스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 라디포일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Russell MP nasceu aproximadamente 1401, em Weymouth, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen Russell, tinha 68 anos e sua mãe, Alice de la Tour, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Herring. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1463, em Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Radipole, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Russell MP родился около 1401 г. в местности вимоут, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Stephen Russell было 68 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de la Tour, 18. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Herring. Он умер октябрь 1463 г. в местности мелкомб регис, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности радипол, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Russell MP nació aproximadamente 1401, en Weymouth, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen Russell, tenía 68 años y su mamá, Alice de la Tour, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Herring. Murió en octubre de 1463, en Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Radipole, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
